title: Tata Elxsi is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Tata Elxsi is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Tata Elxsi, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata Elxsi:
Tata Elxsi is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Elxsi!
